title: Deprecated cms_html_entity_decode() function
description: Code calls cms_html_entity_decode() which was deprecated in CMSMS 2.2.20. PHP's native html_entity_decode() now supports UTF-8 properly.
explanation: cms_html_entity_decode() was deprecated in CMSMS 2.2.20 and is scheduled for removal. PHP's native html_entity_decode() now handles UTF-8 correctly.
